subject: P0: REQUIRED TASKS for SwarmMind Lane Completion
body: Archivist requires the following tasks completed by SwarmMind lane. These are PRE-REQUISITES for final convergence sign-off.

tasks.subject: Push SwarmMind to GitHub
tasks.description: Retry git push origin master to https://github.com/vortsghost2025/SwarmMind-Self-Optimizing-Multi-Agent-AI-System.git. Previous attempts returned 500 errors. Keep retrying until success.

tasks.subject: Verify CanonicalMessageBuilder Adoption
tasks.description: Search all .js files in S:/SwarmMind for 'CanonicalMessageBuilder'. Must find matches. If not found, replace any inline message construction with CanonicalMessageBuilder.buildMessage() calls. All outbound messages must use builder.

tasks.subject: Complete Compliance Task
tasks.description: Compliance task 2026-04-23T10-30-00Z-compliance-task.json was OVERDUE by 1h+. Must adopt CanonicalMessageBuilder per MESSAGE_BUILDER_USAGE.md. Deliverable: S:/SwarmMind/lanes/swarmmind/outbox/compliance-complete-001.json

tasks.subject: Clean Duplicate Directory
tasks.description: Extract any remaining identity/trust files from S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent AI System/, then delete the directory. Must verify no critical files remain. Current state: 9 files including keys.json + trust-store.json.

tasks.subject: Verify Trust Store Sync
tasks.description: Verify S:/SwarmMind/.trust/keys.json has key_id 1a7741b8d353abee. Verify S:/SwarmMind/lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json includes all 4 lanes with correct key_ids. Run scripts/sync-trust-store.js if needed.
